extensionDescription.message: List open git pull requests of a file

popupEmptyList.description: Empty list message in the popup

popupLoading.description: Loading message in the popup while fetching pull requests

optionsTokenLabel.description: Label for a forge token input on the options page

optionsTokenHint.message: Optional. A token raises the API rate limit and lets the extension see private repositories. It is stored only on this device.
optionsTokenHint.description: Hint explaining a forge token input on the options page

optionsSave.description: Label of the save button on the options page

optionsClear.description: Label of the clear button on the options page

optionsSaved.description: Status message shown after saving the token

optionsCleared.description: Status message shown after clearing the token
